subject: Investment Proposal — AutoBot Series Seed
snippet: Eric, I've reviewed the deck and I'm interested in leading the seed round. Can we schedule a call this week to discuss terms?
body:
Eric,

I've reviewed the deck and I'm interested in leading the seed round. Can we schedule a call this week to discuss terms? I have a few questions about the cost model and the graduated autonomy approach.

Specifically:
1. What's the burn rate at Phase 1?
2. How do you measure readiness for L1 autonomy?
3. What's the timeline to first product revenue?

Looking forward to connecting.

Best,
Bennett

subject: Re: Monday demo prep
snippet: Hey bro, I want to make sure this thing is ready for Bennett on Monday. What do I need to install?
body:
Hey bro,

I want to make sure this thing is ready for Bennett on Monday. What do I need to install? Remember I'm basically non-technical so it needs to be one-click or close to it.

Also — can we add a kill switch? Like if I text you "STOP" everything dies. Bennett will want to see that.

Let me know what you need from me.

Dustin

subject: YC W27 Application — AutoBot follow-up
snippet: Hi Eric, Following up on your application. We'd like to schedule a partner interview for next Tuesday.
body:
Hi Eric,

Following up on your application. We'd like to schedule a partner interview for next Tuesday at 2pm PT. The interview will be 10 minutes with two partners.

Please confirm your availability and have a working demo ready. We'll want to see the system process real email in real-time.

Best,
Sarah Chen
YC Admissions

subject: [formul8-platform] Dependabot alert: @anthropic-ai/sdk
snippet: A new version of @anthropic-ai/sdk is available. We recommend updating to fix a known issue.
body:
Dependabot has detected a new version of @anthropic-ai/sdk (0.40.0) that fixes a known issue with streaming responses.

Current version: 0.39.0
Recommended: 0.40.0

Severity: Low

Update your package.json to resolve this alert.

body:
Hi Eric,

Here's your Vercel usage summary for February 2026:

- Deployments: 47
- Bandwidth: 12.3 GB
- Serverless executions: 145,230
- Spend: $22.40

You're within your Pro plan limits.

The Vercel Team

subject: Claude API partnership program — invitation
snippet: Eric, I'd like to invite Formul8 to our early partner program. We've been impressed with your usage patterns.
body:
Eric,

I'd like to invite Formul8 to our early partner program. We've been impressed with your usage patterns and the multi-agent architecture you've built.

The program includes:
- Priority API access
- 50% credit on the first 3 months
- Direct engineering support channel
- Early access to new model releases

Could you commit to a 6-month partnership starting March 1? We'd need a signed agreement by end of next week.

Best,
Alex Johnson
Partnerships, Anthropic

subject: Eric, 5 people viewed your profile this week
snippet: See who's been looking at your LinkedIn profile this week.
body:
5 people viewed your profile this week. Upgrade to Premium to see who.

Top viewers by industry: Technology, Finance, Legal

LinkedIn Team

subject: Compliance review — Q1 metrc data reconciliation
snippet: Hey Eric, The Q1 reconciliation is complete. Found 3 discrepancies that need your sign-off before we submit to the state.
body:
Hey Eric,

The Q1 reconciliation is complete. Found 3 discrepancies that need your sign-off before we submit to the state:

1. Package #MTC-2026-0412: weight variance of 0.3g (within tolerance but flagged)
2. Transfer #TR-8891: receiving facility reported 2 fewer units than manifest
3. Harvest batch #HB-0227: moisture content reading seems anomalous

Deadline for state submission is March 5. Can you review by EOD Monday?

Thanks,
Maya

subject: API rate limit increase — approved
snippet: Your request for increased rate limits has been approved. New limits are effective immediately.
body:
Hi Eric,

Your request for increased rate limits has been approved. New limits are effective immediately:

- Requests/min: 500 → 2,000
- Tokens/min: 100K → 500K
- Concurrent requests: 10 → 50

No changes needed on your end. Let me know if you need anything else.

Jared

subject: Your February 2026 invoice is ready
snippet: Your Stripe invoice for February 2026 is now available.
body:
Your Stripe invoice for February 2026 is now available.

Total: $127.40
Payment method: Visa ending in 4242
Status: Paid

View invoice: https://dashboard.stripe.com/invoices/...

Stripe Team

subject: Re: Monday demo prep
snippet: One more thing — Bennett asked if this could eventually handle Slack and Discord too, not just email.
body:
One more thing — Bennett asked if this could eventually handle Slack and Discord too, not just email. He runs like 5 different messaging platforms and wants one unified dashboard.

Also he said the kill switch thing is a must-have. Like non-negotiable.

Dustin

subject: LLC formation complete — Delaware filing confirmed
snippet: Eric, the Delaware LLC formation is complete. EIN assigned. Operating agreement attached for your review.
body:
Eric,

The Delaware LLC formation is complete. EIN assigned. Operating agreement attached for your review and signature.

Next steps:
1. Sign operating agreement (deadline: March 3)
2. Open business bank account
3. Set up Stripe under the new entity
4. Transfer domain registrations

Let me know when you've reviewed the agreement.

James Park, Esq.
Park & Associates
